title: USB C Charger Cable 2 Pack 1M+1M USB A to USBC Cable Type C Charger Fast Charging Phone Charger Lead for iPhone 17 16 15 Pro Max Plus Air, Galaxy S25 S24 Ultra, Google Pixel, for iPad Air
features: USB-C Compatibility: Our premium USB-A to USB-C cable ensures reliable charging for your iPhone 15, iPhone 16 and iPhone 17. 1M+1M USB Type-C cables fast charging are well compatible with iphone 15, iphone 15 Pro, iphone 15 Plus, iphone 15 Pro Max, iphone 16, iphone 16 Pro, iphone 16 Plus, iphone 16 Pro Max, iPhone 17, iPhone 17 Air, iPhone 17 Pro, iPhone 17 Pro Max, Galaxy S24 S23 S22 S21 S20 S10 S10e S10+ Plus 5G S8 S8+ S9 S9+ S8 Plus S9 Plus, Note 8 Note 9 Note10 Note10+ Plus 5G, A10e A20 A30 A40 A40s A50 A60 A70 A80 M30s A9/9s A9 Star A8s(2018) .

Fast Charging: 1M/3.3ft +1M/3.3ft usb a to usb c cable fast charge, data transfer speed can reach 40~60MB/S (480Mbps), usb to usb c cable accelerate the speed by delivering 5V/3A safe charging power (25% faster) compared with other cables which provides 5V/2.4A current.

Enhanced Durability: Reinforced usb c cable with special joint design that have passed 30000+ times bending tests for extra protection and durability. High quality thermoplastic elastic TPE and PVC material can avoid tangling the wire.

Multiple Protection: USB C charger cable lead has electronic safety certifications that comply with appropriate standards. The built-in smart chip of our USB type c cable can automatically detect the device and provide stable voltage and current. USB a to usb c cable charging lead has multiple protection functions such as over-voltage protection, over-heat protection and over-charge protection to ensure safe charging of the device.

What You Get: You will receive 2 pack 1M(3.3ft) +1M(3.3ft) type c charger cable fast charging. Meets multiple need when you want to charge a device in the office, at home or on the car. And LCOGPDOY offers a 24-month worry-free warranty and 24-hour friendly customer service.
